steps.name: run_minimal_analysis
steps.command: /tmp/sure_eval_librosa/.venv/bin/python -c "import librosa; y, sr = librosa.load('tests/fixtures/shared/mir/rhythm_22k_15s.wav', sr=None); onset_env = librosa.onset.onset_strength(y=y, sr=sr); tempo, beats = librosa.beat.beat_track(onset_envelope=onset_env, sr=sr); print(float(tempo), len(beats))"

constraints: Transient runtime assets must stay under /tmp because the workspace has no free space.
Network access for uv lock and uv sync requires escalated execution outside the sandbox.
